SwallowSafe

Protecting Every Breath.

A portable, non-invasive wearable device that detects swallowing-related events in real time — giving patients real-time feedback and clinicians the data they need, from home.

The Challenge

A Silent, Life-Threatening Problem

Dysphagia causes difficulty swallowing, commonly caused by stroke, Parkinson's, neurological disorders, dementia, and cancer — leading to aspiration pneumonia, malnutrition, and repeated hospital admissions.

🏥

Clinic Dependency

Patients go unmonitored between hospital appointments, leaving dangerous gaps in care and delaying critical interventions.

⏱️

Delayed Response

Every second counts. Without immediate detection and alert, unsafe swallowing events can rapidly escalate to life-threatening situations.

😔

Quality of Life

Constant fear of choking and loss of independence at every meal profoundly impacts patients, families, and caregivers.

Smart Detection System

Our Solution

A Smarter Way to Protect Lives

SwallowSafe is a portable, non-invasive wearable collar that uses 4x piezoelectric contact microphones combined with an ultrasonic transducer to continuously monitor swallowing events.

When an unsafe swallow is detected, a pager alert is sent directly to the carer immediately — and all data is visualised live in a clinician app. Bridging the gap between clinical appointments, from home.

The Process

How SwallowSafe Works

Three seamless steps from sensor to caregiver response.

1
🔍

Detect

4x piezoelectric contact mics and an ultrasonic transducer continuously monitor neck movement and swallowing vibration.

→
2
⚡

Analyse

Device self-calibrates on power-up. TinyML program applies threshold logic and motion check to confirm unsafe swallow events.

→
3
🔔

Alert

Instant pager notification to the carer. Live swallow data visualised in the clinician app in real time.

Features

Built to Protect

Every detail engineered for safety, comfort, and clinical reliability.

📡

Real-time Monitoring

Continuous dual-sensor swallow detection with live data logging and visualisation.

🩺

Non-invasive Design

Comfortable TPU collar — no surgery, no discomfort, no disruption to daily life.

🧠

Auto-Calibration

Self-calibrates on every power-up for maximum detection accuracy with each patient.

🔔

Instant Pager Alert

When unsafe swallow detected, a pager alert is sent directly to the carer immediately.

💻

Clinician App

Dashboard lets clinicians monitor swallow data, trends, and event history.

📶

Bluetooth Low Energy

BLE connectivity keeps the device lightweight, efficient, and wirelessly connected.

Prototype

From Concept to Prototype

🖨️

Click to add photo
3D Printed Collar

3D Printed Collar

TPU collar with embedded piezoelectric mics and ultrasonic transducer, refined through iterative prototyping.

🔌

Click to add photo
Circuit & Electronics

Circuit & Electronics

MCU running filtering + TinyML firmware, rechargeable battery and BLE module on breadboard.

📱

Click to add photo
Clinician App

Clinician App

C# Visual Studio app showing live swallow events, unsafe swallow count, and patient data export.

Impact

A Growing Need

SwallowSafe targets 2% of Ireland's 400,000 dysphagia population in Year 1, scaling to the UK and beyond.

Faster response saves lives.

Every second between an unsafe swallow event and caregiver response matters. SwallowSafe closes that gap — from home, in real time, at an affordable price.

Who It Helps

  • Post-stroke patients developing dysphagia
  • Individuals with Parkinson's, dementia or neurological disorders
  • Elderly residents in long-term care facilities
  • Cancer patients with swallowing difficulties
